recommendedActivities.title: The Ariège agenda is all year round ...
recommendedActivities.description: Classical music, jazz, blues, theater, puppets, traditional shows, historical reenactments, music festivals, concerts, auteur cinema, sporting events, cycling races, trail races... The Ariège agenda is rich, it is rich, above all, in the enthusiasm and creativity of the volunteers who mobilize throughout the year to provide original and quality programming.

allActivities.title: Music, Dance, Comedy, Theatre and more…
allActivities.description: The summer calendar in the Tarn is dotted with festivals whose reputation is firmly established: the unmissable Pause Guitare in Albi which has been running for 20 years, Musique sur Ciel in Cordes, Musiques des Lumières in Sorèze, L’été de Vaour, Les Musicales de Montmiral in Castelnau-de-Montmiral, Les Estivales de Lavaur, Les Extravadanses in Castres… There are countless performers who sing, dance and bring the Tarn to life.

Your opinion counts!
allActivities.description: Take part in our survey and be in with a chance of winning an unforgettable holiday in Occitania.

allActivities.title: Discover Occitanie by train
allActivities.description: A new way to travel, a unique experience in France! Climb aboard a regional train (liO Train): there are 19 railway lines across the Occitanie region, with suggestions for visits, activities, accommodation and restaurants all along the way.

allActivities.title: Occitanie Rail Tour
allActivities.description: The Occitanie Rail Tour invites you to discover our region in a different way. Welcome aboard !

allActivities.title: Welcome to the South of France!
allActivities.description: Preserved natural areas and breathtaking landscapes, an exceptional heritage and a celebrated lifestyle, leisure activities for everyone, everywhere: Occitanie epitomises France as a whole, with its own accent and cherished customs. Come and explore it, contemplate the scenery, be moved and enjoy a great experience to share.

allActivities.title: Which universe do you prefer in Occitanie ?
allActivities.description: Where would you like to spend your next vacation in the south of France? Our region is as large as a country. Together, let's give meaning to the word "travel".
